cards.back: A type of neural network designed to process data with grid-like topology, such as images
A mathematical operation that slides a small receptive field over the input data, performing a dot product and generating feature maps
A CNN typically consists of convolutional layers, pooling layers, and fully connected layers, with multiple convolutional and pooling layers
Convolutional neural networks evolved from traditional neural networks, with the introduction of convolutional and pooling layers in the 1980s and 1990s
Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are a type of deep learning model that are particularly well-suited for image classification, object detection, and image generation tasks
